zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Farrar於1648年5月20日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可琳時，她的父親Thomas Farrar34歲，母親Mrs. Thomas Farrar19歲。她於1667年5月20日與Melatiah Lothrop在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1712年5月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波桑德維其享年64歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Farrar于1648年5月20日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可琳时，她的父亲Thomas Farrar34岁，母亲Mrs. Thomas Farrar19岁。她于1667年5月20日与Melatiah Lothrop在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1712年5月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波桑德維其享年64岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波。

nameMeanings.name: Farrar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): occupational name for a blacksmith or worker in iron. From Middle English fer(r)o(u)r, fer(r)er, fa(r)ro(u)r ‘ironworker, blacksmith’ (Old French ferreor, from medieval Latin ferrator, an agent derivative of ferrare ‘to shoe horses’, from ferrum ‘iron’, in medieval Latin ‘horseshoe’). Compare Ferrier and Farrow .

variants.name: Ferrer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Luis, Francisco, Miguel, Juan, Jorge, Carlos, Angel, Pedro, Roberto, Manuel, Ramon.
Catalan and southern French: from Latin ferrarius ‘ironworker, blacksmith’, either an occupational name or from the same word as an old personal name. This is the commonest Catalan surname.
English: variant of   Farrar  .

variants.name: Farrer
meanings: English: variant of   Farrar  .
German: variant of   Forer   or   Fahrer  .

variants.name: Ferrar
meanings: English: variant of   Farrar  .

variants.name: Ferro
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Antonio, Angelo, Mario, Pasquale, Alberto, Antonino, Bernardo, Guido, Carmine, Concetta, Dino, Ottavio, Pietro, Rocco.  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Luis, Carlos, Ramon, Eduardo, Fermin, Sixto, Angel.

Italian, Spanish, Portuguese, and Maltese: from ferro ‘iron’ (from Latin ferrum), used as a nickname denoting someone who was strong or as a metonymic occupational name for someone who produced or worked iron.
Italian: from a medieval personal name, preserved in the modern pet form Ferruccio.

variants.name: Fara
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Eduardo, Carlos, Mario.
Italian (Sardinia): occupational name from Sardinian fara ‘messenger, courier, collector’.
Czech and Slovak (also Fára): topographic name from fara ‘priest's house’.

variants.name: Farrow
meanings: English (northern): hypercorrected form of Farrar , an occupational name for a smith or worker in iron. The original -ar or -er ending of this name came to be regarded as an error, and was changed to -ow.

variants.name: Farrah
meanings: English: variant of   Farrar  .
Americanized form of Arabic   Farah  .

variants.name: Ferrier
meanings: Scottish and English: occupational name for a smith, one who shoed horses, from Old French ferrier ‘blacksmith, ironworker’ (medieval Latin ferrarius, from ferrus ‘horseshoe’, from Latin ferrum ‘iron’). Compare Farrier , Farrar .

Scottish and English: occupational name for a ferryman, from Middle English ferier(e) ‘ferryman’. Black reports that lands called Ferrylands in Dumbarton, by a ferry across the Clyde, belonged to Robert Ferrier in 1512.
French: occupational name from Old French ferrier ‘blacksmith, farrier’ (see 1 above).

variants.name: Farra
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Ammar, Bassel, Fadi, Fadia, Farid, Hazem, Nabil, Nadim, Salem, Samir, Waseem, Yasser.  French Henri, Marcel.
English: variant of   Farrar  .
Arabic (the Levant): possibly a variant of   Farah  . Bearers of this surname are both Muslims and Christians.

variants.name: Furrow
meanings: Probably an altered form of English Farrow (see Farrar ).

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Farrar was born on 20 May 1648, in Lynn, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Thomas Farrar, was 34 and her mother, Mrs. Thomas Farrar, was 19. She married Melatiah Lothrop on 20 May 1667, in Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 23 May 1712, in Sandwich, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 64, and was buried in Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Farrar est née le 20 mai 1648, à Lynn, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Thomas Farrar, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Thomas Farrar, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Melatiah Lothrop le 20 mai 1667, à Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 mai 1712, à Sandwich, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Farrar am 20. Mai 1648 in Lynn, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Farrar 34 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Thomas Farrar 19. Sie hat am 20. Mai 1667 in Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Melatiah Lothrop geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. Mai 1712 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Sandwich, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Farrar è nata il il 20 maggio 1648 nel Lynn, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Thomas Farrar, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Thomas Farrar, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Melatiah Lothrop il 20 maggio 1667, nel Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 23 maggio 1712, nel Sandwich, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Farrarが1648年5月20日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスリンで生まれた時，父Thomas Farrarは34歳，母Mrs. Thomas Farrarは19歳であった。1667年5月20日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルでMelatiah Lothropと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1712年5月23日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルサンドウィチで64歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルバーンスタブルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Farrar(이)가 1648년 5월 20일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 린에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Farrar(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Thomas Farrar(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1667년 5월 20일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일에서 Melatiah Lothrop(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1712년 5월 23일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 샌드위치에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 바른스타블일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Farrar nasceu em 20 de maio de 1648, em Lynn, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Thomas Farrar, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Thomas Farrar, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Melatiah Lothrop em 20 de maio de 1667, em Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de maio de 1712, em Sandwich, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Farrar родилась 20 мая 1648 г. в местности линн, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Thomas Farrar было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Thomas Farrar, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Melatiah Lothrop 20 мая 1667 г. в местности барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 23 мая 1712 г. в местности сэндвич, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности барнстабл, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah Farrar nació el 20 de mayo de 1648, en Lynn, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Thomas Farrar, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Mrs. Thomas Farrar, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Melatiah Lothrop el 20 de mayo de 1667, en Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 23 de mayo de 1712, en Sandwich, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
